title: COSY Grammar Entry
description: Schema for all grammar data files in the COSYlanguages platform

category.description: Linguistic category: verbs, nouns, adjectives, etc.

label.description: Label in the target language. No translation.

level.description: CEFR level this group belongs to. Every group must have a level.

definition.description: A plain explanation of this grammar concept, written in the target language, using only vocabulary and structures appropriate for the stated level. A1 definitions use only the simplest words. C2 definitions may use precise linguistic terminology.

rules.description: Each rule must also carry a level and a plain-language explanation adapted to that level.

rule.description: The rule itself, stated in the target language

level.description: CEFR level this specific rule is introduced at

explanation.description: Plain-language explanation of this rule, written at the stated level. Do not use metalanguage above the student's level.

example.description: Example sentence in the target language illustrating this rule

counter_example.description: An incorrect form showing what to avoid — optional but valuable from B1 upwards

examples.description: Additional example sentences in the target language

exceptions.description: Exceptions or irregular forms — in the target language

word_ids.description: List of word_id values from vocabulary files that belong to this grammar group. This is the link from grammar → vocabulary. Allows the grammar page to display real words that follow this rule, and allows search to surface this grammar group when a student looks up a specific word.
